'''zachate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:qualitatively|qualitatively]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-ch-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qualitatively|qualitatively]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zachate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zachate|zachate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zachatesher|zachatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zachatesherĂ«m|zachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zachatero|zachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zachateshĂ«|zachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zachateshĂ«m|zachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizachatero|gokizachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizachateshĂ«|gokizachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizachateshĂ«m|gokizachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozachankerom|gozachankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozachankeshĂ«|gozachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozachankeshĂ«m|gozachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozachankeya|gozachankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zachaterom|zachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zachatemu|zachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zachateya|zachateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizachaterom|gokizachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizachatemu|gokizachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizachateya|gokizachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zachachate|zachachate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zachachatesher|zachachatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zachachatesherĂ«m|zachachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zachachatero|zachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zachachateshĂ«|zachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zachachateshĂ«m|zachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizachachatero|gokizachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizachachateshĂ«|gokizachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizachachateshĂ«m|gokizachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozachachankerom|gozachachankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozachachankeshĂ«|gozachachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozachachankeshĂ«m|gozachachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozachachankeya|gozachachankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zachachaterom|zachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zachachatemu|zachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zachachateya|zachachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizachachaterom|gokizachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizachachatemu|gokizachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizachachateya|gokizachachateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zĂŠchĂŠte|zĂŠchĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zĂŠchĂŠtesher|zĂŠchĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m|zĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠchĂŠtero|zĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|zĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|zĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠchĂŠtero|gokizĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|gokizĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozĂŠchĂŠnkerom|gozĂŠchĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozĂŠchĂŠnkeya|gozĂŠchĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠchĂŠterom|zĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠchĂŠtemu|zĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zĂŠchĂŠteya|zĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠchĂŠterom|gokizĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠchĂŠtemu|gokizĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizĂŠchĂŠteya|gokizĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zafchafte|zafchafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zafchaftesher|zafchaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafchaftesherĂ«m|zafchaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafchaftero|zafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zafchafteshĂ«|zafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafchafteshĂ«m|zafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafchaftero|gokizafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizafchafteshĂ«|gokizafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafchafteshĂ«m|gokizafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozafchafnkerom|gozafchafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozafchafnkeshĂ«|gozafchafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafchafnkeshĂ«m|gozafchafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozafchafnkeya|gozafchafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafchafterom|zafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafchaftemu|zafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zafchafteya|zafchafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafchafterom|gokizafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafchaftemu|gokizafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizafchafteya|gokizafchafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
